title: Mare de Déu del Toro (Patroness of Menorca)
location: Santuari del Toro, Monte Toro, Es Mercadal
description: On 8 May Menorca honours its patroness, the Mare de Déu del Toro, with a pilgrimage to the sanctuary atop Monte Toro, the island's highest point (358 m). The diocesan bishop performs the blessing of the four winds and the four cardinal points.
